ops.title: cc-notes unification Phases 4-5: MCP parity, reverse drift test, MCP-first guidance
ops.description: Every CLI capability reachable from MCP (new runbook/project/search tools, shared anchor fragments in tools_anchor.go, TestCobraReachableFromMCP with commented exclusion list), plus MCP-first guidance: session.py mcp_active gating, redirect.py failed-CLI-to-MCP hook, SKILL.md rewrite with worked tool-call examples, cli-reference MCP: lines + parse test, CLAUDE.md Durable Records update. Plan: /Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-14/plans/there-are-lots-of-steady-frost.md (Phases 4-5). Blocked by Phases 2-3.

ops.text: TestCobraReachableFromMCP green and demonstrated red against pre-phase HEAD

New and extended tools registered: runbook_edit/rm/search/comment/archive/activate, runbook step and run tools, project_activate, top-level search, anchors on runbook_add, note on task_criterion_met/failed
session.py nudges branch on mcp_active; redirect.py maps failed cc-notes Bash argv to the matching MCP tool; uvx capt-hook test and uv run tests/test_cc_notes.py green
SKILL.md MCP-first with worked examples; cli-reference MCP: lines validated by a parse test; CLAUDE.md Durable Records names MCP tools; slop-cop clean on changed prose
